blended.narrative: Troll Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.3 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,912 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 44°F.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
